## Checklist

- [ ] Edited the TypeScript in `src/`, **not** the bundled output directly
- [ ] Ran `npm run build` so `com.tokensaver.dashboard.sdPlugin/bin/plugin.js` is regenerated and committed
- [ ] Ran `streamdeck validate com.tokensaver.dashboard.sdPlugin` with no errors
- [ ] If a readout/setting changed: updated `ui/token-savings.html` and the README
- [ ] Tested on Windows and/or macOS (note which below)
